title: Copying certain images into ostree fail
body:
If an image contains a non-writeable directory, when unpacked and ready to be imported into an ostree, it fails:

Setup to reproduce:

```
$ mkdir test
$ cd test
$ skopeo --version
skopeo version 0.1.27 commit: 9d3a3eb447362cc7df192e808bb6a64586af9d3e
$ rpm -qi skopeo
Name        : skopeo
Version     : 0.1.27
Release     : 1.git93876ac.fc27
Architecture: x86_64
Install Date: Mon 11 Dec 2017 09:57:24 AM CET
Group       : Unspecified
Size        : 20900789
License     : ASL 2.0
Signature   : RSA/SHA256, Sat 25 Nov 2017 12:21:30 PM CET, Key ID f55e7430f5282ee4
Source RPM  : skopeo-0.1.27-1.git93876ac.fc27.src.rpm
Build Date  : Wed 22 Nov 2017 02:19:03 PM CET
Build Host  : buildvm-04.phx2.fedoraproject.org
Relocations : (not relocatable)
Packager    : Fedora Project
Vendor      : Fedora Project
URL         : https://github.com/projectatomic/skopeo
Summary     : Inspect Docker images and repositories on registries
Description :
Command line utility to inspect images and repositories directly on Docker
registries without the need to pull them
$ ostree --repo=repo init --mode=archive
```

Bug:

```
$ id
uid=1000
$ skopeo copy docker://docker.io/openshift/origin-metrics-heapster:latest ostree:docker.io/openshift/origin-metrics-heapster:latest@$(pwd)/repo
Getting image source signatures
Copying blob sha256:93857f76ae30d903bbdad13fbf7fad95ce1c0b52b7d5644651e01c6c7a906312
 67.19 MB / 67.19 MB [======================================================] 4s
Copying blob sha256:4e61ce2c52ddb62baf16783fc598459eb868690509521c70d2e0a4e228d7a972
 196.78 MB / 196.78 MB [===================================================] 16s
Copying blob sha256:dd390b33ea7b603e9b811bb5bd84e63029b1353fafe632d0551b6796b3eb9746
 715 B / 715 B [============================================================] 0s
Copying blob sha256:3fc0170be0043baecf3c8e62626efa1bb89d612b1625afdbc56d43bb9ae447fa
 62.72 MB / 62.72 MB [======================================================] 4s
Copying blob sha256:f4e99900d5038d7e16ac73e11d4c272cca378757424890a30bb162bde6736a11
 1.89 KB / 1.89 KB [========================================================] 0s
Copying blob sha256:57764dfe1cdb63881add93ca6f4a336b5b8a65f74a8b3dab79660f333c06a2b4
 1.54 KB / 1.54 KB [========================================================] 0s
Copying config sha256:93f72c7c2f465c6e145a41b1d4d6d5ad9b868dd14bfec8510fe039701b002f72
 6.64 KB / 6.64 KB [========================================================] 0s
Writing manifest to image destination
Storing signatures
FATA[0063]  (dest: remove /tmp/docker.io_2Fopenshift_2Forigin-metrics-heapster_3Alatest/3fc0170be0043baecf3c8e62626efa1bb89d612b1625afdbc56d43bb9ae447fa/root/usr/sbin/zic: permission denied): Error committing the finished image: exit status 2 


$ rm /tmp/docker.io_2Fopenshift_2Forigin-metrics-heapster_3Alatest/3fc0170be0043baecf3c8e62626efa1bb89d612b1625afdbc56d43bb9ae447fa/root/usr/sbin/zic
rm: cannot remove '/tmp/docker.io_2Fopenshift_2Forigin-metrics-heapster_3Alatest/3fc0170be0043baecf3c8e62626efa1bb89d612b1625afdbc56d43bb9ae447fa/root/usr/sbin/zic': Permission denied
```

The problem is that the extracted dir is not writeable:

```
$ ls -lnZ /tmp/docker.io_2Fopenshift_2Forigin-metrics-heapster_3Alatest/3fc0170be0043baecf3c8e62626efa1bb89d612b1625afdbc56d43bb9ae447fa/root/usr/sbin/ -a
total 3324
drwxr-xr-x. 2 1000 1000 unconfined_u:object_r:user_tmp_t:s0    180 Jan 17 15:35 .
drwxr-xr-x. 6 1000 1000 unconfined_u:object_r:user_tmp_t:s0    120 Jan 17 15:32 ..
-rwx------. 1 1000 1000 unconfined_u:object_r:user_tmp_t:s0 860880 Jun 20  2017 build-locale-archive
-rwx------. 1 1000 1000 unconfined_u:object_r:user_tmp_t:s0 770256 Jun 20  2017 glibc_post_upgrade.x86_64
-rwxr-xr-x. 2 1000 1000 unconfined_u:object_r:user_tmp_t:s0  23104 Jun 20  2017 iconvconfig
-rwxr-xr-x. 2 1000 1000 unconfined_u:object_r:user_tmp_t:s0  23104 Jun 20  2017 iconvconfig.x86_64
-rwxr-xr-x. 1 1000 1000 unconfined_u:object_r:user_tmp_t:s0 950784 Jun 20  2017 ldconfig
-rwxr-xr-x. 1 1000 1000 unconfined_u:object_r:user_tmp_t:s0 741520 Jun 20  2017 sln
-rwxr-xr-x. 1 1000 1000 unconfined_u:object_r:user_tmp_t:s0  14632 Jun 20  2017 zdump

$ chmod u+w /tmp/docker.io_2Fopenshift_2Forigin-metrics-heapster_3Alatest/3fc0170be0043baecf3c8e62626efa1bb89d612b1625afdbc56d43bb9ae447fa/root/usr/sbin
$ rm /tmp/docker.io_2Fopenshift_2Forigin-metrics-heapster_3Alatest/3fc0170be0043baecf3c8e62626efa1bb89d612b1625afdbc56d43bb9ae447fa/root/usr/sbin/zic
$ echo $?
0
```

comments.body:
@giuseppe ?

FWIW:
```
FATA[0063]  (dest: remove /tmp/docker.io_2Fopenshift_2Forigin-metrics-heapster_3Alatest/3fc0170be0043baecf3c8e62626efa1bb89d612b1625afdbc56d43bb9ae447fa/root/usr/sbin/zic: permission denied): Error committing the finished image: exit status 2 
```
The message in `(dest: ...)` reports a failure to clean up; it does need to be fixed, but the first failure is reported as `Error committing the finished image: exit status 2`.
this has been fixed the ostree storage.  Also, now we create a user namespace for pulling so that it is possible to write for root in the namespace since it has CAP_DAC_OVERRIDE
